member.name: T:LabApiExtensions.Configs.EffectConfig
member.summary: Easy access for effect related methods.

member.name: T:LabApiExtensions.Configs.MathValueDouble
member.summary: Option to specify math operation and value for it.

member.summary: The value to apply with the math operation.

member.name: P:LabApiExtensions.Configs.MathValueDouble.Math
member.summary: Gets or sets the mathematical options to use for calculations.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MathValueDouble class.

member.name: M:LabApiExtensions.Configs.MathValueDouble.#ctor(LabApiExtensions.Enums.MathOption,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MathValueDouble class with the specified mathematical operation and value.
member.param: The mathematical operation to associate with the value.
The numeric value to be used with the specified mathematical operation.

member.name: T:LabApiExtensions.Enums.DamageType
member.summary: Damage types until NW adds into BaseGame/LabApi.

member.name: F:LabApiExtensions.Enums.DamageType.Any
member.summary: Not a real Damage type. Use for 3rd party damage related stuff.

member.name: F:LabApiExtensions.Enums.DamageType.Custom
member.summary: Damage is by a custom reason.

member.name: F:LabApiExtensions.Enums.DamageType.Silent
member.remarks: No items or ragdoll will spawn.

member.name: F:LabApiExtensions.Enums.DamageType.GrayCandy
member.summary: Damage done by a gray candy.

member.name: T:LabApiExtensions.Enums.MathOption
member.summary: Options for changing the base value with Math.

member.name: F:LabApiExtensions.Enums.MathOption.None
member.summary: No Math Option, returns with InValue.

member.summary: Trying to enable effect for via parameters.
member.remarks: A of 0 means that it will not expire.

member.name: M:LabApiExtensions.Extensions.EffectExtension.EnableEffectIfNotExists(LabApi.Features.Wrappers.Player,System.String,System.Byte,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Trying to enable effect for if the effect hasnt been enabled yet via parameters.
member.returns: on success and effect has not been enabled otherwise
member.remarks: A of 0 means that it will not expire.

member.returns: on increasing or enabling the effect, otherwise .

member.returns: on success and effect has not been enabled otherwise
